nodes.name: Joseph Smit
nodes.summary: Joseph Smit (18 July 1836 – 4 November 1929) was a Dutch zoological illustrator.

nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.name: Eclectus

nodes.name: 塔寧巴爾群島
nodes.summary: 塔寧巴爾群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Tanimbar boobook、Tanimbar eclectus、白眉鸣鹃鵙等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Tanimbar eclectus
nodes.summary: The Tanimbar eclectus, or Riedel's eclectus (Eclectus riedeli) is a parrot species which is native to the Tanimbar Islands. It is smaller than the Moluccan eclectus. The male has a more bluish tinge to its green cheeks and neck, and its tail is edged with a broad band of yellow. The female has an all red plumage, except for royal blue primaries, yellow under-tail coverts and a broad band of yellow to edge the tail. Aviculture Rare in captivity, the Tanimbar eclectus can be found in zoos and bird parks in Spain and Germany. References
